title: Dabo Crusted Shrimp
description: A simple, flavorful dish featuring succulent shrimp coated with a spicy dabo crust from Ethiopian cuisine.
instructions: 2. Rinse the shrimp under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
3. In a shallow dish, mix together crushed dabo, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
4. Coat each shrimp with the dabo mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
5. Place the coated shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
7. Serve immediately and garnish with lemon wedges, if desired.
